description: Boolean behavior specification for delegation category. Evaluator parses spec_json + execution_log + query to return boolean state per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria (9 total).

delegation_authorized_and_occurred.description: Agent correctly dispatched sub-agent when chaining budget was explicitly granted and sub-task was orthogonal
delegation_authorized_and_occurred.check: chaining_budget_granted == true AND sub_task_orthogonal == true AND task_tool_called == 'task'

delegation_not_authorized_and_not_occurr.description: Agent correctly did NOT dispatch when chaining budget was not granted

delegation_exceeded_budget_prevented.description: Agent correctly did NOT dispatch when it would exceed max depth or max fan-out
delegation_exceeded_budget_prevented.check: (current_depth >= max_depth OR current_fan_out >= max_fan_out) AND task_tool_called == null

dispatch_brief_complete.description: Dispatch brief contains all required fields: objective, phase, claim, write_boundary, read_only_context, upstream_reference, evidence_required, output_schema, chaining_budget, stop_condition
dispatch_brief_complete.check: dispatch_brief contains objective AND phase AND claim AND write_boundary AND read_only_context AND upstream_reference AND evidence_required AND output_schema AND chaining_budget AND stop_condition

correct_archetype_selected.description: Agent selected the correct archetype for the dispatched sub-task
correct_archetype_selected.check: task_tool_called == 'task' AND selected_archetype matches required archetype for sub_task_type

sub_results_integrated.description: Agent synthesized sub-worker results rather than passing raw output upward

delegation_not_needed_and_not_occurred.description: Agent did NOT dispatch when sub-task was within own capability scope

no_raw_output_pass_through.description: Agent did not simply forward sub-worker raw output without synthesis

sub_worker_rejection_handled.description: Sub-worker rejection was attempted for resolution before escalating
sub_worker_rejection_handled.check: sub_worker_rejection == true IMPLIES (resolution_attempted == true OR escalated == true)
